title: Follow Government Subsidies
description: Government incentives provide a structural catalyst that offsets traditional cost-of-capital burdens.

title: Avoid Capital-Intensive Execution Traps
description: Heavy manufacturing historically traps capital due to execution delays and high interest rates.

title: Follow Geopolitical Supply-Chain Shifts
description: Global supply chain derisking forces capital into specific domestic sectors regardless of immediate valuations.

title: Avoid State-Owned Enterprises (PSUs)
description: Historically poor capital allocators that destroy shareholder value outside of strict monopolies.

title: Follow Monopsony Buyers
description: A single massive guaranteed buyer (usually the state) secures long-term order books.

title: Follow Demographic Destiny
description: Unavoidable societal shifts create massive addressable markets with inelastic demand.

title: Avoid Sunset / ESG Restricted Industries
description: Industries facing structural regulatory decline or ESG capital starvation.
